title: Where is Mari from
wikitext:
[]: Where is Mari from?             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Mon Jul 06, 2009 7:03 am I was wondering, Mari seems to speak fluent english and her surname is german and english though she knows Kaji who is american. Just where is she from, does anyone know?

[]: Re: Where is Mari from? (may contain spoiler)             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Jul 06, 2009 7:08 am Duskbyday wrote: her surname is german

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Mon Jul 06, 2009 7:26 am Thnk u, whoops my bad I meant Japanese and english for mari's surname. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 06, 2009 7:30 am Makinami Mari Illustrious takes a name of a British warship.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Mon Jul 06, 2009 8:45 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:40 am Mari's from New Jersey. There I made it up. It's done. It should be part of the canon.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jul 06, 2009 10:27 am robot anno wants all my money!

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Mon Jul 06, 2009 10:38 am jeez, that huge pic scared the crêpes out of moi ...

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jul 06, 2009 10:43 am Just to make everyone go WTF, I bet Dr.Robot (COUGH) I mean Anno, is probably going to come up with some haywire story about her being born over the ocean, or while in a plane or being born on a country border or something messed up like that. Just to mess up our minds.. Again.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 06, 2009 11:18 am She's from the freakin' Moon! Mari and Kaworu are spies for Seele--making them twins--but he's not onto the fact she's a FAR so they'll have to straighten things out with an epic battle of Source of Life versus First Ancestral Race in 3.0. /Bullshit answer Seriously though, at this point the only thing we can assume is Mari is from England, or was born in the states. Anything else, we just don't know yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Jul 06, 2009 11:40 am Mari is a cybernetic entity, like Major Kusanagi. She can speak to you with her miiiiind ...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jul 06, 2009 12:10 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Mari is a cybernetic entity, like Major Kusanagi.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jul 06, 2009 2:03 pm She's from the other side of the galaxy because Mari is a FAR who-*Kaji'd*

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Mon Jul 06, 2009 2:09 pm The next person who tries to rev... suggest that "Mari is a FAR" will get sniped like AuraTwilight.

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Mon Jul 06, 2009 2:13 pm Mari is Satan.

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Mon Jul 06, 2009 2:26 pm OMG!!! i just found out!!! Mari is Pen Pen who is the equivalent of god!!!

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jul 06, 2009 2:53 pm Mari is Satan. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by catinajar » Mon Jul 06, 2009 3:04 pm I went to school with Mari and I can confirm that she is from England like my fair self. Her likes include skunks, Jean Claude Van Damme and black metal, and dislikes include kittens, studying, and romcoms. She has never visited New Jersey, but has always wanted to. She secretly fancies Kaworu. Honestly.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jul 06, 2009 3:11 pm WHAT IF MARI IS LIKE IS ISAFRAEL AND HAS ANOTHER HALF ( Mr.Tabris ) AND THEN BECOMES ONE WITH HER OTHER HALF AND BECOMES THE BIG BADASS NEW KICK EVA ASS ANGEL?

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Mon Jul 06, 2009 3:57 pm I smell an epic fanfic...

Article: Where is Mari from
 I went to school with Mari and I can confirm that she is from England like my fair self. Her likes include skunks, Jean Claude Van Damme and black metal, and dislikes include kittens, studying, and romcoms. She has never visited New Jersey, but has always wanted to. She secretly fancies Kaworu. Honestly.
